message:
🐛 Remove validate-prow-yaml job from a2a (#66)

* 🐛 Fix uv PATH in a2a presubmit jobs

The uv package manager installs to /root/.local/bin, not /root/.cargo/bin.
This was causing the verify and verify-py312 jobs to fail with:
  /bin/bash: line 6: uv: command not found

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Remove validate-prow-yaml job from a2a

The a2a repo no longer has a .prow.yaml file (removed to fix duplicate
job conflicts), so this validation job is no longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,26 +1,5 @@
 presubmits:
   kubestellar/a2a:
-    - name: pull-kubestellar-a2a-validate-prow-yaml
-      always_run: true
-      optional: true
-      decorate: true
-      clone_uri: "ssh://git@github.com/kubestellar/a2a.git"
-      extra_refs:
-        - org: kubestellar
-          repo: infra
-          base_ref: main
-          clone_uri: git@github.com:kubestellar/infra.git
-      spec:
-        containers:
-          - image: us-docker.pkg.dev/k8s-infra-prow/images/checkconfig:v20260109-e821f0db6
-            command:
-              - checkconfig
-            args:
-              - -plugin-config=/home/prow/go/src/github.com/kubestellar/infra/prow/plugins.yaml
-              - -config-path=/home/prow/go/src/github.com/kubestellar/infra/prow/config.yaml
-              - -job-config-path=/home/prow/go/src/github.com/kubestellar/infra/prow/jobs
-              - -prow-yaml-repo-name=$(REPO_OWNER)/$(REPO_NAME)
-
     - name: pull-kubestellar-a2a-verify
       always_run: true
       decorate: true
